demographics.living_situation: shares a flat with a roommate, who is present

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: It feels like my chest and back are physically tearing apart from the inside, and the pain is unbearable.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain came on all at once a little while ago and it's the worst thing I've ever felt — I'm on the floor and I feel like I'm going to pass out.

symptom_narrative.onset: sudden — it hit full force out of nowhere, worst right from the very first second
symptom_narrative.duration: started a short time ago and hasn't let up at all
symptom_narrative.character: a tearing, ripping feeling deep inside my chest that goes straight through to my back
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: unbearable, the worst pain of my life, I can't keep still
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: middle of my chest and straight through to between my shoulder blades
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it started, doesn't come and go
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: nothing changes it — moving or breathing doesn't make it worse or better
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: really lightheaded and sick in the stomach, sweaty, feel like I might faint
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can't stand or sit still, writhing on the floor

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I'm really flexible / double-jointed and very tall with long arms and fingers — doctors said it runs in my body's connective tissue
the lens in one of my eyes slipped out of place a few years ago
a doctor told me the big blood vessel coming off my heart is a bit enlarged and put me on a tablet for it
past_medical_history.how_managed: prescribed a daily tablet but I don't take it regularly

family_history_as_reported.narrative: not sure — I know I've had this tall, very flexible build my whole life

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: young adult, normally fully independent and active, lives with a roommate who made the call

objective_data_offered.value: very tall and slim with strikingly long arms, legs and fingers; pale and sweaty; can't stay still, rolling and clutching his chest on the floor
roommate says he went white and sweaty within seconds, keeps saying he feels like he'll pass out, and can't lie still because of the pain
about 160/90 on a home arm cuff (right arm)
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on an uncalibrated home cuff taken while in severe pain and distress — one arm only

objective_data_offered.value: pulse around 115 on the home cuff readout
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: home cuff readout during acute distress
